Despite past injuries, Milano’s extensive experience and potential impact are seen as valuable assets for a Super Bowl push that Los Angeles needs. The Rams have addressed their secondary by signing cornerbacks and may draft with regards to offensive side of the ball. But in terms of the defensive side, they may target a veteran linebacker in free agency, and Milano could be a great fit.

The bill aims to protect a specific social and cultural group facing extreme discrimination, with new provisions for authority designation and graded punishments for offenses. Opposition members criticized the bill for limiting self-determination.

'Dhurandhar 2' box office Day 6: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 650 cr India gross milestone
description: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its historic dominance at the box office, amassing a staggering Rs. 844.76 crore in worldwide gross collections. This global haul is fueled by a robust Rs. 619.76 crore from the domestic Indian market and a powerful Rs. 225.00 crore from overseas territories. Currently, the high-octane sequel has already secured a domestic net collection of Rs. 519.12 crore, firmly establishing it as one of the fastest Indian films to reach these elite milestones.

title: Pichai on ChatGPT shock: CEO recalls ‘Code Red’ after debut; says push led to Gemini 3
description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai revealed his "uncomfortably exciting" reaction to ChatGPT's 2022 launch, admitting the speed of AI diffusion surprised even his "AI-first" company. This prompted a 'Code Red' that ultimately led to the development of Gemini 3, now outperforming rivals. Pichai emphasized Google's quiet, full-stack innovation approach, building necessary infrastructure before product release.

title: Megan Thee Stallion opens up on feeling like a burden amid Klay Thompson romance
description: Megan Thee Stallion, the six time Grammy winner, has turned heads with her high profile relationship with the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson. As fans root for an engagement announcement, Megan Thee Stallion's heartbreaking statements about feeling "too much" have sparked chaos and made fans emotional over the pain she has gone through in her life before she met the NBA legend.

title: H-1B visa registrations dip 30-50%: List of cos emerging as ‘favourites’ in new system
description: H-1B visa registrations for FY27 have plummeted by 30-50%, driven by higher fees and a new lottery prioritizing wages. This shift benefits mid-tier IT firms and US Master's graduates, while large outsourcing companies face reduced dominance. The recalibration signals a move towards quality talent and increased costs for employers.

title: 100 Days With Neuralink N1: paralysed gamer hails thought control; trial hints at new independence
description: Noland Arbaugh, the first recipient of Neuralink's N1 implant, celebrated 100 days with the device. Paralyzed since 2016, he now controls a MacBook and plays World of Warcraft using only his thoughts. Arbaugh describes the experience as life-changing, enabling a new level of independence and interaction.
